title: lepidium stylatum subsp. petrophilum
intro: Lepidium stylatum subsp. petrophilum, also known as rock cress, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of rock cress include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Rock cress is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its herbal uses, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
